description: Extraction schema for SEC 8-K current reports. Applies to the primary cover sheet PLUS any narrative exhibit (typically Exhibit 99.x = press release).

filing_metadata.report_date: ISO date — date of earliest event reported

summary.category: one of: earnings_release | acquisition | divestiture | leadership_change | financial_restatement | dividend_buyback | debt_issuance | facility_event | regulatory_disclosure | shareholder_meeting | reg_fd | other
summary.headline: 1 short sentence (under 25 words) of what this filing announces
summary.narrative_summary: 2-4 sentence paraphrase of the filing's substance

earnings_release.applicable: boolean (true if this 8-K is a quarterly/annual earnings release, typically Item 2.02 + Exhibit 99.1)

segment_commentary.quoted_metric: optional: a specific revenue or margin figure if cited

facilities_mentioned.name: string (plant/facility name as cited)
facilities_mentioned.facility_type_hint: oilseed_crush | ethanol | biodiesel | nutrition | grain_handling | refinery | corporate_hq | other | unknown
facilities_mentioned.context: 1 sentence explaining why mentioned (e.g. 'recovery from outage', 'announced expansion', 'sale to X')

regulatory_or_policy_mentions: Free-form list of policy/regulation references (e.g. RVO, RFS, 45Z, EPA biofuel pathway, FDA labeling, EU CFD)

ma_or_capital_allocation.type: acquisition | divestiture | dividend | buyback | debt_issuance | debt_repayment

people_quoted: Names of executives quoted in the press release (e.g. CEO, CFO)
sections.extraction_notes: any caveats from the extractor (e.g. 'numbers from Exhibit 99.1; cover sheet only had Item references')
